claim_boundary: BHSM v5.8 audits the primordial compact-state and global size modulus as possible absolute unit anchors. The current action selects dimensionless ratios M_BH/M_star=1/2 and R_BH/ell_star=2 but does not generate ell_star, M_star, particle masses, gauge couplings, CKM values, rare-B observables, or full BHSM completion.

primordial_to_late_time_map.initial_release: candidate compact geometric release from normalized primordial boundary data
primordial_to_late_time_map.redshifted_relics: physical on-shell relic matter/radiation may be redshifted from an already-defined initial scale
primordial_to_late_time_map.scale_transport: redshift can transport a scale after ell_star exists; it cannot create ell_star
primordial_to_late_time_map.virtual_or_effective_memory: late boundary/topographic response memory can be effective or virtual

propagation.collar_thickness: rho_star L is physical only after L=ell_star is fixed
propagation.fermion_operator: D_phys = M_BH D_hat only after M_BH exists; no fermion masses are derived
propagation.gauge_operator: L_gauge,phys = M_BH^2 L_gauge,hat only after M_BH exists; alpha_i remains action-gated
propagation.hessian_green_operator: G_phys = M_BH^-2 H_hat^-1 only after M_BH exists
propagation.neutral_response: neutral physical eV/GeV scale remains open
propagation.scalar_spectrum: H_ST,phys = M_BH^2 H_ST,hat only after M_BH exists

unit_anchor.hbar_c_status: conversion convention only; hbar=c=1 may be used as natural-unit convention
unresolved_constants: absolute action coefficient or scale-modulus source
